original: a KihaCorp-branded synth-phallus modelled after a terran horse’s

KihaCorp’s popular companion droid line has numerous accessories and addons available for purchase across the galaxy. Some of the most popular are the hot-swappable genitals they’re equipped with, in particular variant phalli and vaginas.\n\nThis one is large-sized, designed to retract into a sheath when not in use or stretch fourteen inches long when fully inflated. It includes its own silicone reservoir and pumps to minimize impact on the android’s body shape during erections.
